violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Per PIC, they are in the process of getting certified. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Various foods were observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. PIC relocated to walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Per PIC, PIC will get recertified. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety registered with RIDOH. Each establishment needs at least one person certified with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024
